subcodes.first_line: This Day is the Day of the triumph of God's Cause. All must hold fast unto the cord of divine bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یوم یوم نصرت امر الهی است باید کل بحبل فضل تمسک
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @Crimson Ark; the Ark of God
